references.title: Numbers Are Not Enough. Why e-Learning Analytics Failed to Inform an Institutional Strategic Plan

annotations.text: LMS have shown to foster a sense of community and progress among the student population and have consequently become a cornerstone of higher education institutions. Authors take data from one institution and analyze the usage patterns of the LMS in relation to student outcomes.
Moreover, the paper delves into how these analytics are used at an institutional level (often they aren’t) and discusses possible reasons for this.
